message:
feat(ws): integrate AI hints into WebSocket error messages

- Update ErrorMessage interface to include severity, hint, and alternative fields
- Add WS_ERROR_HINTS map with helpful guidance for WebSocket error codes
- Create createWSError helper function that automatically includes hints
- Update all error creation in handlers.ts to use createWSError
- Add comprehensive tests for AI hints coverage in error responses

This completes the AI hints integration (flywheel_gateway-brp), ensuring
WebSocket errors now include the same helpful guidance as REST API errors.

Closes: flywheel_gateway-brp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
